name: docx_convert
description: Convert an open document to another format: md/html are produced in-engine (lossless for content, revisions and comments annotated inline) and returned as content; pdf/png go through the render adapter and return a path, never inline bytes. Use docx_open or docx_create first to get a doc_id.

path.description: Output path for file-producing targets. Required when to is 'pdf' or 'png'; ignored for 'md' and 'html'.
Written output path, returned for 'pdf' and 'png'.
